TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Art Becker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 1, Art Becker, biru na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Art Becker mqwas biru sa Camelback pqwsan biru seneng sa Phoenix, Arizona. Art Becker t'aring kawas tay 1961 tehuk kawas tay 1964, mqwas biru sa Arizona State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 2005 kawas
S.PHON: art βeʦ~ʨker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, art βeʦ~ʨker, βiru na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja art βeʦ~ʨker mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨamelβaʦ~ʨk pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa pħoenix, arizona. art βeʦ~ʨker tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa arizona s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ
S.FORM: Art Becker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 1, Art Becker, biru na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Art Becker mqwas biru sa Camelback pqwsan biru seneng sa Phoenix, Arizona. Art Becker t'aring kawas tay 1961 tehuk kawas tay 1964, mqwas biru sa Arizona State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 2005 kawas
S.PHON: art βeʦ~ʨker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, art βeʦ~ʨker, βiru na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja art βeʦ~ʨker mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨamelβaʦ~ʨk pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa pħoenix, arizona. art βeʦ~ʨker tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa arizona s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ
